attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Attackers exploited Meta's AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts by linking them to unauthorized emails.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The rise of AI is prompting discussions on its impact on employment, sparking debates on how to manage the transition for workers.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Courts are facing an influx of AI-generated lawsuits, complicating the legal process as many plaintiffs lack legal representation.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The global health care sector is challenged by a combination of underinvestment and increased demand, necessitating solutions involving agentic AI.
